nasb.text: They *went into Capernaum; and immediately on the Sabbath He entered the synagogue and began to teach.

esv.text: And they went into Capernaum, and immediately on the Sabbath he entered the synagogue and was teaching.

cnv.text: 他們到了迦百農，耶穌隨即在安息日進入會堂教導人。

ccb.text: 他们到了迦百农，耶稣在安息日去会堂里讲道。

csbs.text: 他们来到迦百农。安息日一到，耶稣就进了会堂教导人。
